name: Qingdao Sentury Tire Co., Ltd.
summary: Qingdao Sentury Tire Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells tires in China. It offers car, 4x4 and SUV, business light truck, winter, run-flat, field racing, and cross country tires, as well as aviation tires under the SENTURY, LANDSAIL, DELINTE, and GROUNDSPEED brands. The company is headquartered in Qingdao, China.
